Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing park, fov 90
- residential road, 1-lane, concrete
- sidewalks absent, curbs absent
- driveways: center; parking: lot
- commercial building at left, 1 story, stucco, brick, glass, metal, flat roof, shallow setback
- commercial building at center, 1 story, concrete, brick, glass, flat roof, shallow setback
- utilities: street lamp, power lines, fire hydrant
- landscape: grass strip, planter, hedge, flower bed
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2005
Post-9/11 era. A 2005 gas station — big multi-island canopy, card readers at every pump, LED price sign, and a convenience store doing most of the business.

PERIOD DETAILS
- automated car wash tunnel beside the lot
- pay-at-pump screens with small displays
- price sign showing gas around $2.30
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of BP
- window signs: 'CAR WASH $6', 'ANY SIZE FOUNTAIN DRINK 99¢'
- ribbon magnets on the door of the service office
- a propane exchange cage by the storefront
Typography: clean sans-serif, polished brand identities.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 4 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a teenager filling tires at the coin-operated air machine
- a customer walking out with a coffee cup
- a couple taking photos with a digital camera
Clothing: men in trucker hats, graphic tees; women in chunky highlights, layered tank tops. Fashion palette: denim, pink, white. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2005-2010 Chevrolet Cobalt — compact economy sedan — gray
- 2000-2007 Ford Taurus — rounded, aging fleet-look sedan — white
- 1998-2005 Volkswagen New Beetle — retro bubble shape — gold
- 2004-2008 Pontiac Grand Prix — sporty sedan plastic cladding — dark red
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2005.
PLACEMENT: the first two parked on the RIGHT side; one parked on the left near the corner; the last one driving toward the camera in the far lane. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable and fiber lines on poles appearing

TREES
- deciduous tree at left: young tree, thin trunk
- deciduous tree at background: young tree, thin trunk
- conifer tree at right: maturing tree
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — early digital camera or Kodak/Fuji consumer film look.
Color: neutral tones. Grain: low grain, early digital noise in shadows.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2000-2007 Ford Taurus — rounded, aging fleet-look sedan
1998-2005 Volkswagen New Beetle — retro bubble shape
2004-2008 Pontiac Grand Prix — sporty sedan plastic cladding
